Board Members

Get to know the dedicated residents who lead our community, make key decisions, and ensure Longhorn Heights thrives year-round.

Meet the Board Members

The Longhorn Heights Board of Directors is made up of residents elected to serve and represent our community. From maintaining shared spaces to ensuring neighborhood guidelines are followed, the board works to keep Longhorn Heights a safe, welcoming, and well-managed place to live.

James Mitchell

President

hello@email.com

(123) 456-7890

Board Elections

Board members are elected by HOA members during our annual community meeting. Each household has one vote, and terms last for two years. Nominations open 30 days before the election.

  • Nominations open in October
  • Annual elections held in November
  • Each household may vote once
  • Results shared via email & posted online
Next Meeting

Tuesday, June 18, 2025 at 6:00 PM

Clubhouse, 123 Longhorn Heights, Austin, TX

Stay Connected with Your Community

Have questions, concerns, or suggestions? Reach out to Longhorn Heights HOA board — we're here to help.
